aliases: น้ำพุสัตว์เลี้ยงอัตโนมัติ

eligibility.interpretation: Pet-owning households are the initial addressable population proxy. Cat or dog ownership and gift purchases are not separately observed.

limitations: The bundled pet-ownership probability is an engineering prior, not an observed Thailand category margin.
The profile does not distinguish cats, dogs, multi-pet households, or non-owner gift purchasers.
Category penetration, purchase frequency, and installed-base replacement cycles are unobserved.
